query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS w9_forms (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  contractorEmail varchar(320) NOT NULL,
  taxYear int NOT NULL,
  name varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  businessName varchar(255),
  taxClassification enum('individual','c_corp','s_corp','partnership','trust_estate','llc','other') NOT NULL,
  llcTaxClassification varchar(50),
  otherTaxClassification varchar(100),
  exemptPayeeCode varchar(10),
  exemptFATCACode varchar(10),
  address text NOT NULL,
  city varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  state varchar(2) NOT NULL,
  zipCode varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  accountNumbers text,
  ssn varchar(11),
  ein varchar(10),
  createdAt timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contract_templates (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  description text,
  contractorRole varchar(100),
  projectName varchar(255),
  projectLocation varchar(255),
  totalFee varchar(20),
  deposit varchar(20),
  finalPayment varchar(20),
  paymentMethod varchar(100),
  equipment text,
  createdBy int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS client_contracts (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  clientName varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  clientCompany varchar(255),
  clientEmail varchar(320) NOT NULL,
  clientPhone varchar(20),
  projectName varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  projectType varchar(100),
  projectLocation varchar(255),
  projectStartDate varchar(50),
  projectEndDate varchar(50),
  projectDescription text,
  deliverables text,
  totalValue varchar(20),
  depositAmount varchar(20),
  depositDueDate varchar(50),
  finalPaymentAmount varchar(20),
  finalPaymentDueDate varchar(50),
  paymentTerms text,
  token varchar(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  status enum('draft','sent','signed') DEFAULT 'draft',
  clientSignature text,
  companySignature text,
  pdfData text,
  sentAt timestamp NULL,
  signedAt timestamp NULL,
  createdAt timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
